summary: Iteration 5 refactor-regression testing complete. Verified all extracted helper functions (build_speaking_assessment, build_body_language_summary, _build_bl_timeline, _compute_trend, _aggregate_per_question) produce identical outputs to the previous inline logic. 24/24 backend tests PASS (10 new iter5 + 14 prior iter4). Frontend /history (4 tabs), /tracker (no infinite fetch loop after useCallback refactor - verified only 2 /api/jobs/saved calls on mount + 0 additional after 3s idle), and /rewriter (keys refactor doesn't break textarea rendering) all pass with zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py build_body_language_summary (line 620-643): entries with genuine 0 values are treated as 'missing' due to `> 0` filter. This carries over from iter4 (already noted). A genuine 0 (head fully turned away) would be silently dropped; consider `is not None` check instead.

server.py _compute_trend (line 739-751): when timeline length is odd (e.g. 3), first-half=[0], last-half=[-1] which is fine, but the middle interview is entirely ignored. Acceptable for a directional signal; could document.
server.py body_language_trends (line 777-807): the `.to_list(200)` cap could silently drop older interviews for very active users; consider pagination or a note. Not blocking.

server.py speaking_assessment (line 592-607): when durations_sec is missing, wpm is estimated as `min(180, max(60, wc*2))` — this synthetic value inflates pace_score for zero-duration submits. Documented behavior but worth surfacing to caller (e.g. add estimated=True flag).
Frontend SavedJobs.jsx useCallback + [load] dep pattern verified: no infinite loop. Good implementation.
test_credentials: Fresh signup via POST /api/auth/signup. Backend test user: qa+iter5_<ts>@talentiq.dev / Password123!. Frontend UI test user: qa+ui_iter5_<ts>_<rand>@talentiq.dev / Password123!. JWT localStorage key: tiq_token.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test users via signup, generated 3 completed interview docs with body-language data (used by trends endpoint tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 2 test files now: test_linkedin_and_interview.py (iter4) and test_iter5_refactor_regression.py (iter5). Together they cover auth+profile+linkedin_url+interview_start+interview_submit (both with and without body_language) + trends endpoint (empty + populated). To test camera-dependent flow, skip in headless. SavedJobs page /tracker verified to make exactly 2 mount-time fetches (React StrictMode double-mount) and 0 subsequent — no infinite loop. Frontend uses localStorage key 'tiq_token' for JWT.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found. Iteration 5 was a pure refactor and all extracted helpers behave identically to the inline logic. Empty catch blocks are now console.warn-ed. useCallback refactor is safe (no infinite loop). Keys refactor in ResumeRewriter render intact.
